## AI Media Buyer By Creatify

Launching today

Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily. [...] Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily.

Every media buyer knows the ritual: five dashboards, three hours of reports, still guessing what to do next. Creatify AI Media Buyer connects to your Meta, Google, AppLovin and TikTok ad accounts and does what a human buyer does audits campaigns, finds spend that's quietly bleeding, spots what's scaling, and acts on it. It generates new creatives from your actual winners and launches them, all through chat. And it remembers your account history, so its recommendations compound over time.

Hey Product Hunt, I'm Yinan, founder of Creatify.

Quick backstory: we've spent 3 years building Creatify. Started with URL to video, then avatars, Ad Clone, and a full creative agent. 3M+ users have used the platform.

But one thing kept bothering me. Our users would make great ads, launch them, then go back to staring at dashboards for hours trying to figure out what was working. The creative side was solved. The media buying side was still manual, scattered, and slow.

So we built AI Media Buyer an agent that plugs into your ad accounts and actually does the work.

results.title: Introducing AI Media Buyer: AI That Runs Your Ads
results.content:
Today we're launching AI Media Buyer, an AI advertising agent inside Creatify that connects to your ad accounts and runs them. It audits your spend, finds what's scaling and what's leaking, builds new campaigns and creative, and launches them. Most tools tell you what happened. AI Media Buyer does something about it.

It's powered by Claude Opus 4.8, one of Anthropic's most advanced reasoning models, and it can go from a brief to a live campaign in under 60 seconds.

## What is an AI Media Buyer [...] ## FAQ

What is AI Media Buyer?

AI Media Buyer is Creatify's AI advertising agent. It connects to your ad accounts, audits your spend, builds campaigns and creative, launches them, and keeps optimizing, all from a chat interface. It's powered by Claude Opus 4.7.

What is media buying?

Media buying is the process of purchasing ad placements and managing the budget, targeting, and creative behind them to reach an audience efficiently. AI media buying uses an AI agent to handle the repetitive parts of that work, like analysis, campaign setup, and optimization, while a human sets the strategy.

Which platforms does AI Media Buyer connect to?

results.title: Top Creatify AI Alternatives: Smarter Video Ad Tools - Zeely AI
results.content:
Why switch to Predis AI?

Creatify’s output is limited to video from product URLs. Predis goes further, enabling full social asset creation — from visual design to captions and publishing. If you’re producing daily content and need consistency across media formats, Predis gives you scale without the manual grind.

### VEED.io: Best for post-production and editing workflows

If your campaigns need professional-looking edits, polished branding, and precise subtitle control, VEED.io fills a gap that Creatify AI doesn’t even address. While Creatify focuses on fast generation from product URLs, VEED.io delivers robust editing features that help refine and localize content before it goes live.

Key features: [...] Pricing is another sticking point. Creatify’s subscription model doesn’t flex with seasonal spikes or rapid scaling, making it harder to justify costs when testing multiple ad variations.

As video marketing evolves, businesses need tools that support faster content iteration, platform-specific optimization, and global readiness. Platforms like Zeely, HeyGen, InVideo, and Synthesia address these needs with AI avatars, multilingual workflows, and modular scripting that lets your team produce and adapt creatives in real time.

## Top Creatify AI alternatives: Side-by-side review for smarter ad creation [...] Why switch to Zeely AI?

Creatify focuses mainly on static output with limited customization. Zeely handles everything — from creative generation to ad deployment and optimization, across both static and video formats. With faster turnaround, higher ROI, and deep AI integrations, Zeely gives you more power, control, and scale in one cohesive platform.

### HeyGen: Best for AI avatars in ecommerce ads

Where Creatify AI offers templated scripts and static visuals, HeyGen gives you fully customizable avatars that lip-sync in over 40 languages, ideal for brands targeting multiple regions or customer segments. This makes it easy to launch global campaigns with native-style presentation and visual consistency.

results.title: 10 Creatify Alternatives: Best AI Ad Tools Compared [2026]
results.content:
## Why Teams Move Beyond Creatify

Creatify is positioned as a fast ad generator with avatars and product image workflows. Reported user issues include output quality inconsistency, awkward avatar behavior, weak language support, robotic voice-over quality, and trial limitations that make evaluation difficult.

Core evaluation criteria for alternatives: output realism, ease of use, ad-scale workflow support, optimization depth, and pricing clarity.

## 10 Creatify Alternatives for AI Ad Campaigns

## 1.Solara AI

Solara AI

Solara AI runs like a full AI marketing agency: content production, campaign launch, ad optimization, and engagement in one autonomous loop. It supports autopilot and co-pilot control so teams can choose full automation or approvals.
